form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[业务组织] fundAccountId[资金账户] statementId[银行对账单] reconciliationDate[对账日期] =========>amount[金额信息]====== bookBalance[账面余额] statementBalance[对账单余额] unreconciledDiff[未达账项差异] =========>result[对账结果]====== isBalanced[是否平衡] reconciledAt[对账时间] reconciledBy[对账人] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] =========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[业务组织] fundAccountId[资金账户] statementId[银行对账单] reconciliationDate[对账日期] =========>amount[金额信息]====== bookBalance[账面余额] statementBalance[对账单余额] unreconciledDiff[未达账项差异] =========>result[对账结果]====== isBalanced[是否平衡] reconciledAt[对账时间] reconciledBy[对账人] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[单号] fundAccountId[资金账户] docStatus[单据状态] isBalanced[是否平衡] reconciliationDate[对账日期]
